formulas.label: e0045
formulas.latex: q_{v}^{ℓ} \cdot q_{v^{'}}^{ℓ} \cdot d_{v}^{ℓ} - q_{v}^{ℓ} \cdot q_{v^{'}}^{ℓ} \cdot d_{v^{'}}^{ℓ} = q_{v}^{ℓ} \cdot q_{v^{'}}^{ℓ} \cdot \left(c \cdot z_{\mathit{vv}^{'}}^{ℓ}\right) , \forall ℓ \in L , \forall v , v^{'} \in V^{ℓ} : v > 1 , v \neq v^{'} ,

formulas.label: e0050
formulas.latex: y_{k}^{ℓ} \leq \underset{v \in V^{ℓ} : d_{v}^{ℓ} / c = k}{\sum} q_{v}^{ℓ} , \forall k \in K , \forall ℓ \in L ,
